text:
Fifteen Minutes (15, Jū Go Fun) is the 284 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Pouf tells Morel that fifteen minutes was the amount of time he thought he would waste before deactivating his smoke. He planned to slip through, and kill off Morel's comrades in the meantime. Morel is surprised that Pouf would think that lowly of him, but Pouf says he gave him too much credit, suddenly leaping high into the air and dividing into hundreds of small clones. As they all chuckle, Pouf says slipping through the smoke was a last resort, and Morel deactivating his smoke is what really allowed him to escape. Morel doesn't believe him, but Pouf continues to assert that Morel made a mistake, with all the clones thanking him.

Morel uses Deep Purple to summon his "Smoke Troopers" to attack the clones, who all run away as they laugh hysterically. The "Smoke Troopers" try to destroy them, but they reform from the divided pieces, leaving Morel in disbelief and wondering if they are invincible. They disappear into the distance, and Morel assures himself that destroying the cocoon was the best move.

As he tries to consider Pouf's next move and runs ahead with his "Smoke Troopers," Pouf suddenly appears behind him, taking hold of his pipe and kicking him hard to the ground. He laughs maniacally and flies away with the pipe, leaving Morel unable to use Deep Purple and left with his remaining "Smoke Troopers." But right then, out of the corner of his eye, Morel notices Youpi slowly approaching him. As he asks Morel if he's the one who can teleport, Knuckle suddenly appears as well, demanding to know what he did with Shoot. Morel says the maximum number of "Smoke Troopers" he can currently maintain is 89, quickly turning them all into Knuckles to surround Youpi. He realizes their plan and manifests more arms, intending to take Knuckle's life once he lets him land a single punch.
